## Checklist

- [ ] `swift test` is green
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the new behavior
- [ ] Updated `OPCODE_STATUS.md` if an opcode changed (with an honest confidence rating)
- [ ] Logged any stub / fake-on-the-wire / hardcode in `SHORTCUTS.md` with an exit plan
- [ ] Recorded any architectural decision in `DECISIONS.md`
- [ ] For graphics ops: added the asymmetric-source orientation test (see `GRAPHICS_Y_FLIP.md`)
